SubmitPage.title: Kekọrịta Mkpa Gị
SubmitPage.disclaimer: Site n'itinye akwụkwọ, ị kwetara na enwere ike ịkekọrịta ozi gị na ndị mmekọ iji nye azịza.
SubmitPage.confirmDetails: Kwenye nkọwa gị ma ọ bụ melite ha n'elu.

Dashboard.title: Akụkọ ihe mere eme mkpa m

Dashboard.pinHint: Mepụta PIN nọmba isii iji nwetaghachi akaụntụ gị ma ọ bụrụ na ị chefuo paswọdu gị.

Common.networkError: Njehie netwọk. Biko lelee njikọ gị.

Common.passwordRequired: Biko tinye paswọdu gị ka ị gaa n'ihu.
Common.passwordTooShort: Paswọdu ga-enwerịrị opekata mpe mkpụrụedemede anọ.

Common.errorSendingCode: A kụrụ afọ n'ala n'iziga koodu nrụpụta. Biko gbalịa ọzọ.
Common.passwordResetSuccess: Atọgharịrị paswọdu nke ọma! Ugbu a, ị banyela.
Common.resetError: A kụrụ afọ n'ala n'ịtọgharị paswọdu. Biko lelee PIN/OTP ma ọ bụ chere nwa oge.
Common.errorUpdatingPin: A kụrụ afọ n'ala n'imelite PIN nkwado.
Common.accountLocked: Ị gbalịrị ọtụtụ ugboro. Akpọchiwo akaụntụ gị nwa oge maka nchekwa.

messages: 📢 Ihe ọhụrụ: Nkwado maka obere azụmahịa adịla n'iji na steeti ise!
🎁 Bonus: Debanye aha taa maka nleba anya pụrụ iche.
⚡ Mmelite: Ihe karịrị olulu mmiri 50 ọhụrụ emepụtara n'izu a.
🌟 Ndụmọdụ: Nkọwa zuru ezu na-enyere anyị aka ịchọta azịza ọsọ ọsọ.
